question: What are the termination conditions mentioned in the agreement?
answer:
According to clause 4 of the leaseDeed.pdf (Page 1), the termination conditions are:

"If the said monthly ground rent or any part thereof payable in the manner hereinbefore
mentioned shall be an arrears for the space of.....months after the same shall have become
due and payable on any of the said days wherein the same ought to be paid as aforesaid"

Note that the exact number of months is not specified in the provided context.
